conditions.column_dimensions: 150 x 1 mm and 150 x 0.5 mm i.d.

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Liquid adsorption chromatography at 'critical' conditions of adsorption (LACCC mode, system 2)
field_evidence.critical_component: samples with the same chemical composition, but different molecular weight, eluted in one peak

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEOs with same end groups (hydroxyl). Functionalized PEOs with different end groups elute at different times.
conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Unter den Eichen 87, 12205 Berlin, Germany

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The determination of 'critical conditions' of adsorption was performed starting with methanol as a thermodynamically 'good' solvent. Successive addition of water as a thermodynamically 'poor' solvent resulted in a change of the chromatographic mode to adsorption mode. The 'critical conditions of adsorption' were established when samples with the same chemical composition, but different molecular weight, eluted in one peak.
field_evidence.critical_component: For the investigated polymer system the 'critical solvent composition' (CSC) could be obtained by adjusting a methanol/water mixture of 84:16 wt %
field_evidence.column_name: two C18 columns (150 x 1 mm and 150 x 0.5 mm i.d., GROM ODS 120 and Zorbax SBC 18)
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: methanol as a thermodynamically 'good' solvent. Successive addition of water as a thermodynamically 'poor' solvent
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The chromatographic systems were kept at a constant temperature of 458C.

conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Unter den Eichen 87, 12205 Berlin, Germany
